nodes.label: Análise Cruzada de Dimensões Criativas e de Mídia
nodes.rationale: Cruzar dimensões criativas com metadados de mídia isola o efeito do criativo do efeito de mídia (posicionamento, segmentação, objetivo), evitando atribuição incorreta de performance ao conteúdo quando a causa real é o meio.

nodes.label: Dual-Database Pattern (PostgreSQL auth + MySQL analytics)
nodes.rationale: PostgreSQL stores auth/sessions via Drizzle ORM; MySQL (airbyte_secom) is the read-only analytics warehouse. Kept separate to enforce security boundary and prevent accidental cross-contamination.

nodes.label: Kwai Platform Specifics — video_completions for VTR/CPV, Novelinhas format
nodes.rationale: Kwai uses video_completions (thruplays ≥15s) instead of video_views for VTR and CPV, unlike Meta/TikTok. The native 'novelinhas' format outperforms standard formats on Kwai. SQL must use NULLIF to avoid division by zero.
nodes.norm_label: kwai platform specifics — video_completions for vtr/cpv, novelinhas format

nodes.label: Format-First Analysis Rule — Never Compare Metrics Across Formats
nodes.rationale: Videos, cards, banners, spots have incomparable engagement profiles. Segment by format before any cross-dimensional analysis. Normalizing by CPM or CPC enables cross-format comparison only when necessary.
nodes.norm_label: format-first analysis rule — never compare metrics across formats
